This field is derived by accumulating the amount field (CLM-VAL-AMT) found in the value code trailer for 
value code (CLM-VAL-CD) equal to ‘73’ for any claim records included in the stay. 

Starting on April 1, 2013, the Budget Control Act of 2011 reduced Medicare payments to all providers by 
2 percent through a mechanism known as sequestration. This reduction applies only to the Medicare 
payment amount and does not affect beneficiaries’ liability for deductibles or coinsurance. The effects
